description_long: This object is a minimalist, abstract doll figure composed of two elongated, slightly curved black forms that intersect at an angle, resembling a stylized human body with a torso and a single limb. The larger segment represents the main body, while the smaller segment suggests an arm or leg, both rendered in a bold, solid black color. The surface appears smooth and uniform, with no visible facial features, clothing details, or articulated joints. The overall silhouette is highly simplified, evoking a modern art or Scandinavian design aesthetic. The object is slender and upright, with a consistent thickness along its length. Its abstract form makes it suitable as a decorative or conceptual toy in urban environments.
description: A minimalist, abstract black doll with two intersecting elongated forms, smooth and featureless, evoking a stylized human figure.
description_view_0: From this view, the doll's two intersecting black forms are clearly visible, with the larger segment upright and the smaller segment angled downward.
description_view_1: This side view shows the doll as a thin, vertical black line, with both segments overlapping and little detail visible.
description_view_2: Here, the intersecting forms are again visible but mirrored, with the larger segment leaning to the right and the smaller segment angled away.
description_view_3: This side view is similar to view 1, showing the doll as a narrow, vertical silhouette with no visible separation between the segments.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the figure is entirely featureless and abstract, with no garments or patterns present.
attribute_pose: The figure is upright with one elongated segment representing the torso and another segment angled downward, suggesting a static, standing pose with a single limb extended.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are present on the figure.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair or hairstyle; the head is not distinctly represented.
